subject: feat(structure): snap-to-fit sets image to contain and shows for any image
body:
Snap to Fit button now appears whenever a cell has an image assigned,
regardless of the current fit mode. Clicking it automatically sets the
image fit to 'contain' before adjusting the cell boundary, so users
don't need to manually change the fit mode first.

Tags: structure, layout, images, ui
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: layout-structure-controls
Semver: minor
